meta.title: DocsPress Theme Demo
meta.author: f
meta.description: A Docusaurus-inspired WordPress documentation theme with nested demo pages.

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; foreach ( wp_get_themes() as $slug => $theme ) { if ( 'DocsPress' === $theme->get( 'Name' ) ) { switch_theme( $slug ); require get_theme_root( $slug ) . '/' . $slug . '/playground/setup.php'; break; } }
